findings.title: Dependency confusion: internal package found on PUBLIC registry (higher version present)
findings.detail: acme-payments-lib is listed as internal, but a public npm package exists (latest=5.0.0, 8 versions). Risk score: 14
findings.recommendation: Pin acme-payments-lib to the exact internal version and scope to your private registry via .npmrc.

findings.title: Dependency confusion: internal package found on PUBLIC registry
findings.detail: acme-shared-utils is listed as internal, but a public pypi package exists (latest=1.0.0, 2 versions). Risk score: 9
findings.recommendation: Pin acme-shared-utils to the internal build and restrict it to the private index.

findings.title: No registry scope configuration found
findings.detail: No npm registry config (.npmrc) detected in project root.
findings.recommendation: Add .npmrc to scope private packages to your internal registry.

findings.title: Unpinned dependency version
findings.detail: requests is declared as '>=2.28', which lets the resolver pick any matching public version.
findings.recommendation: Pin requests to an exact version.
